variants: Revanth Avanthi currently lives in Buckeye Terrace, where he balances his career and community life. Born at Jasperpine Farm, his early experiences instilled a deep interest in language that led him to pursue higher education. He attended Yonderwood College, developing a solid foundation in linguistic study. Upon graduating, Revanth began working at Frostpine Networks, where he employs Wolof syllables as his professional language. His passion for language continues to flourish as he navigates his career.
